build.buildCommand: if [ "$SERVICE_ROLE" = "web" ]; then dotnet publish src/ZamanTakasi.Web/ZamanTakasi.Web.csproj -c Release -o out; else dotnet publish src/ZamanTakasi.Api/ZamanTakasi.Api.csproj -c Release -o out; fi

deploy.startCommand: if [ "$SERVICE_ROLE" = "web" ]; then dotnet out/ZamanTakasi.Web.dll; else dotnet out/ZamanTakasi.Api.dll; fi
